scale.h1: text-5xl md:text-7xl lg:text-8xl font-bold tracking-tighter uppercase

visual_enhancers.grain_overlay: opacity-[0.03] pointer-events-none fixed inset-0 z-50 mix-blend-overlay url('https://grainy-gradients.vercel.app/noise.svg')

gradients.gold_text: bg-clip-text text-transparent bg-gradient-to-r from-[#D4AF37] via-[#E5C158] to-[#D4AF37]

buttons.primary: bg-gold-500 text-black font-bold uppercase tracking-widest px-8 py-4 hover:bg-white hover:scale-105 transition-all duration-300 rounded-none clip-path-slant
buttons.secondary: border border-gold-500/30 text-gold-400 uppercase tracking-widest px-8 py-4 hover:bg-gold-500/10 transition-all duration-300 rounded-none
buttons.floating: fixed bottom-6 right-6 z-50 bg-gold-500 text-black font-bold p-4 shadow-2xl rounded-full md:hidden animate-pulse-slow

cards.service_card: group relative bg-charcoal border border-white/5 p-8 hover:border-gold-500/30 transition-all duration-500 overflow-hidden
cards.pricing_item: flex justify-between items-baseline border-b border-white/5 py-4 group hover:border-gold-500/20 transition-colors

navigation.wrapper: fixed top-0 w-full z-40 bg-obsidian/80 backdrop-blur-lg border-b border-white/5
navigation.link: text-sm uppercase tracking-[0.2em] text-neutral-400 hover:text-gold-400 transition-colors

home.hero_strategy: Full screen dark cinematic video/image. Minimal text. Huge gold CTA 'RÉSERVER'.
home.bento_strategy: Showcase top 3 services (Coupe, Barbe, Braids) in a 4-4-4 grid.

services.layout: Two-column layout: Left sticky menu of categories, Right scrollable list of services.

gallery.layout: Masonry grid with filter tabs (Coupes, Barbe, Braids, Locks).

instructions_to_main_agent: IMPORTANT: Set 'dark' class on the html element by default.
CRITICAL: Do NOT use standard Shadcn cards. Create custom div-based cards with the styles defined in 'components.cards'.
CRITICAL: Ensure the booking link opens in a new tab.
CRITICAL: Map Section must be styled dark (use a dark map overlay or CSS filter: grayscale(100%) invert(90%) contrast(85%)).
universal_guidelines: Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable.
